title: Reis Birthday
wikitext:
[]: Rei's Birthday             Quote Post by jiynovelo » Sun Apr 17, 2011 4:34 am When is the Real Birthday of Rei Ayanami? some says its March 30 20xx(I dont know the specific year) while others say its September 13 2001. when is her real birth date?

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Apr 17, 2011 6:52 am Depends on whether you count the birth of Lilith, the birth of Rei I, Rei II or Rei III as Rei´s "Birthday".

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sun Apr 17, 2011 7:46 pm Nobody really knows.

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Sun Apr 17, 2011 9:17 pm Wouldn't it be the date that the CD "The Birthday of Rei Ayanami" came out? Or is that not considered canon?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Apr 17, 2011 9:28 pm AshPhoenix wrote: Wouldn't it be the date that the CD "The Birthday of Rei Ayanami" came out? Or is that not considered canon?

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Sun Apr 17, 2011 9:52 pm Reichu wrote: IIRC, that came out on Megumi Hayashibara's birthday... which is also Yui's birthday, not must-stay-mysterious Rei's. Marketing decided to lie a little because Yui wouldn't sell CDs as well.
